title: MIDAS Enumerations
description: Shared enumerations for the MIDAS API, derived from lookup tables.

signalType.description: Human-readable signal type returned in RIN list queries.

signalTypeParam.description: Numeric signal type parameter: 0=All, 1=Electricity rates, 2=GHG emissions, 3=Flex Alert.

rateType.description: Rate classification code. TOU=Time of Use, CPP=Critical Peak Pricing, RTP=Real-Time Pricing, DSR=Demand Side Response, VPP=Virtual Power Plant, V-D/C-D/R-D/T-D=Volumetric/Capacity/Revenue/Transmission Delivery, GHG=Greenhouse Gas.

sector.description: Customer sector: Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Agricultural, REV, CEV, CIA, or All.

unit.description: Value unit from the MIDAS Unit lookup table.

dayTypeString.description: Day type as human-readable string (GET response format).
